name: aimipay-agent
description: Install AimiPay as a Codex-local plugin with MCP payment tools and a companion skill.

interface.shortDescription: Installable Tron payment tools for Codex-style agents.
interface.longDescription: Adds AimiPay MCP tools, install doctor, and companion skill guidance so agent hosts can discover and pay for merchant capabilities.
defaultPrompt: Install the AimiPay MCP payment tools for me.
List paid merchant offers and estimate the budget.
Run the AimiPay install doctor and summarize next steps.
